failures.description: The agent made an invalid ProductCatalogSearch invocation: it omitted the required string item_id and replaced the provided product_id "1762337868" with numeric 0.
failures.checklist_reasoning: The user's goal was to get the price of item 1345513440 using ProductCatalogSearch with the available item_id and product_id. At index 2, the agent had all required information from the Coordinator plan query, but invoked/prepared the tool with args {"product_id": 0}, omitting required item_id and using the wrong type/value for product_id. The tool then explicitly returned a SchemaError at index 3 confirming the invocation was malformed.
